action_mappings.detach_counterparty_from_case: detach counterparty account {} from aml case {}

action_mappings.detach_sanctions_entry_from_case: detach sanctions list entry {} from aml case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_case_from_analyst: release an aml case {} from an analyst {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_evidence_to_case: attach an evidence item {} to an aml case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_evidence_from_case: detach an evidence item {} from an aml case {}

action_mappings_indef.attach_transaction_to_case: attach a transaction {} to an aml case {}

action_mappings_indef.attach_counterparty_to_case: attach a counterparty account {} to an aml case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_counterparty_from_case: detach a counterparty account {} from an aml case {}

action_mappings_indef.detach_sanctions_entry_from_case: detach a sanctions list entry {} from an aml case {}

action_mappings_indef.conduct_primary_review_with_counterparty: conduct primary review for an aml case {} in a processing queue {} with a counterparty account {} and a specialist resource {}

action_mappings_indef.request_escalation_approval: request escalation approval for an aml case {} linked to a customer {}, a transaction {}, and an escalation team {}

predicate_mappings.screening_completed: screening for the case {} is completed
predicate_mappings.first_line_verified: the first line for the case {} is verified
predicate_mappings.case_linked_customer: the case {} is linked to the customer {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_transaction: the case {} is linked to the transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_counterparty: the case {} is linked to the counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_sanctions_entry: the case {} is linked to the sanctions list entry {}
predicate_mappings.case_routed_to_queue: the case {} is routed to the queue {}
predicate_mappings.primary_review_completed: the primary review for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.senior_review_requested: a senior review has been requested for {}
predicate_mappings.case_variant_b_senior_reviewer_candidate: {} is a candidate for case variant b senior reviewer for {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_senior_reviewer: {} is the assigned senior reviewer for {}
predicate_mappings.case_queue_eligibility: {} is eligible for the processing queue {}
predicate_mappings.case_counterparty_eligibility: {} is eligible for the counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_specialist_resource_eligibility: {} is eligible for the specialist resource {}
predicate_mappings.case_sanctions_entry_eligibility: {} is eligible for the sanctions list entry {}
predicate_mappings.case_approver_group_link: {} is linked to the approver group {}
predicate_mappings.case_default_senior_reviewer: the default senior reviewer for {} is {}

preconditions: I can only register an aml case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I register an aml case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_case_to_analyst.description: assign an aml case A to an analyst B
preconditions: I can only assign an aml case A to an analyst B if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign an aml case A to an analyst B if it is not the case that the case A is allocated
effects: Once I assign an aml case A to an analyst B, it is the case that the case A is assigned to B and the case A is allocated
Once I assign an aml case A to an analyst B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_case_from_analyst.description: release an aml case A from an analyst B
preconditions: I can only release an aml case A from an analyst B if it is the case that the case A is assigned to B
I can only release an aml case A from an analyst B if it is not the case that the primary review for A is completed and it is not the case that A is ready for approval
effects: Once I release an aml case A from an analyst B, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an aml case A from an analyst B, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that the case A is allocated and it is not the case anymore that screening for the case A is completed and it is not the case anymore that the first line for the case A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation pending and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation approved and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A

attach_evidence_to_case.description: attach an evidence item B to an aml case A
preconditions: I can only attach an evidence item B to an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach an evidence item B to an aml case A, it is the case that A has evidence B
Once I attach an evidence item B to an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_evidence_from_case.description: detach an evidence item B from an aml case A
preconditions: I can only detach an evidence item B from an aml case A if it is the case that A has evidence B
effects: Once I detach an evidence item B from an aml case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach an evidence item B from an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that A has evidence B

complete_screening_with_evidence.description: complete screening for an aml case A with an evidence item B
preconditions: I can only complete screening for an aml case A with an evidence item B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case A is allocated and A has evidence B
I can only complete screening for an aml case A with an evidence item B if it is not the case that screening for the case A is completed
effects: Once I complete screening for an aml case A with an evidence item B, it is the case that screening for the case A is completed

complete_screening_with_signal.description: complete screening for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B
preconditions: I can only complete screening for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the case A is allocated and B is available
I can only complete screening for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B if it is not the case that screening for the case A is completed
effects: Once I complete screening for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B, it is the case that screening for the case A is completed and A has an escalation pending
Once I complete screening for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

certify_evidence_with_document.description: certify an evidence item B for an aml case A using a document resource C
preconditions: I can only certify an evidence item B for an aml case A using a document resource C if it is the case that screening for the case A is completed and the case A is allocated and A has evidence B and C is available
I can only certify an evidence item B for an aml case A using a document resource C if it is not the case that the first line for the case A is verified
effects: Once I certify an evidence item B for an aml case A using a document resource C, it is the case that the first line for the case A is verified
Once I certify an evidence item B for an aml case A using a document resource C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation pending

certify_evidence_with_senior_reviewer.description: certify evidence for an aml case A with a senior reviewer B
preconditions: I can only certify evidence for an aml case A with a senior reviewer B if it is the case that the case A is allocated and B is the assigned senior reviewer for A
I can only certify evidence for an aml case A with a senior reviewer B if it is not the case that the first line for the case A is verified
effects: Once I certify evidence for an aml case A with a senior reviewer B, it is the case that the first line for the case A is verified
Once I certify evidence for an aml case A with a senior reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation pending

attach_customer_to_case.description: attach a customer B to an aml case A
preconditions: I can only attach a customer B to an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is eligible for the customer B
effects: Once I attach a customer B to an aml case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the customer B
Once I attach a customer B to an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_customer_from_case.description: detach a customer B from an aml case A
preconditions: I can only detach a customer B from an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the customer B
effects: Once I detach a customer B from an aml case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a customer B from an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the customer B

attach_transaction_to_case.description: attach a transaction B to an aml case A
preconditions: I can only attach a transaction B to an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is eligible for the transaction B
effects: Once I attach a transaction B to an aml case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B
Once I attach a transaction B to an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_transaction_from_case.description: detach a transaction B from an aml case A
preconditions: I can only detach a transaction B from an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B
effects: Once I detach a transaction B from an aml case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a transaction B from an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the transaction B

attach_counterparty_to_case.description: attach a counterparty account B to an aml case A
preconditions: I can only attach a counterparty account B to an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is eligible for the counterparty account B
effects: Once I attach a counterparty account B to an aml case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the counterparty account B
Once I attach a counterparty account B to an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_counterparty_from_case.description: detach a counterparty account B from an aml case A
preconditions: I can only detach a counterparty account B from an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the counterparty account B
effects: Once I detach a counterparty account B from an aml case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a counterparty account B from an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the counterparty account B

attach_sanctions_entry_to_case.description: attach a sanctions list entry B to an aml case A
preconditions: I can only attach a sanctions list entry B to an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is eligible for the sanctions list entry B
effects: Once I attach a sanctions list entry B to an aml case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the sanctions list entry B
Once I attach a sanctions list entry B to an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_sanctions_entry_from_case.description: detach a sanctions list entry B from an aml case A
preconditions: I can only detach a sanctions list entry B from an aml case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the sanctions list entry B
effects: Once I detach a sanctions list entry B from an aml case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a sanctions list entry B from an aml case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the sanctions list entry B

conduct_primary_review_queue.description: conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B involving a customer C and a transaction D
preconditions: I can only conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B involving a customer C and a transaction D if it is the case that the case A is allocated and the case A is linked to the customer C and the case A is linked to the transaction D and B is active and A is eligible for the processing queue B
I can only conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B involving a customer C and a transaction D if it is not the case that the primary review for A is completed
effects: Once I conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B involving a customer C and a transaction D, it is the case that the case A is routed to the queue B and the primary review for A is completed
Once I conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B involving a customer C and a transaction D, it is not the case anymore that B is active

conduct_primary_review_with_counterparty.description: conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B with a counterparty account C and a specialist resource D
preconditions: I can only conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B with a counterparty account C and a specialist resource D if it is the case that the case A is allocated and the case A is linked to the counterparty account C and D is available and B is active and A is eligible for the processing queue B and A is eligible for the specialist resource D
I can only conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B with a counterparty account C and a specialist resource D if it is not the case that the primary review for A is completed
effects: Once I conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B with a counterparty account C and a specialist resource D, it is the case that the case A is routed to the queue B and the primary review for A is completed and a specialist is required for A and A has an escalation pending

Once I conduct primary review for an aml case A in a processing queue B with a counterparty account C and a specialist resource D, it is not the case anymore that B is active and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_temporary_review_markers.description: clear temporary review markers for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C
preconditions: I can only clear temporary review markers for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C if it is the case that the primary review for A is completed and a specialist is required for A and the case A is linked to the customer B and the case A is linked to the transaction C
effects: Once I clear temporary review markers for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation pending

request_escalation_approval.description: request escalation approval for an aml case A linked to a customer B, a transaction C, and an escalation team D
preconditions: I can only request escalation approval for an aml case A linked to a customer B, a transaction C, and an escalation team D if it is the case that the first line for the case A is verified and the primary review for A is completed and the case A is linked to the customer B and the case A is linked to the transaction C and A is linked to the approver group D

I can only request escalation approval for an aml case A linked to a customer B, a transaction C, and an escalation team D if it is not the case that A has an escalation pending and it is not the case that A is ready for approval
effects: Once I request escalation approval for an aml case A linked to a customer B, a transaction C, and an escalation team D, it is the case that A is ready for approval

escalate_and_request_specialist_approval.description: escalate and request specialist approval for an aml case A linked to a counterparty account B, a sanctions list entry C, and a specialist team D
preconditions: I can only escalate and request specialist approval for an aml case A linked to a counterparty account B, a sanctions list entry C, and a specialist team D if it is the case that the first line for the case A is verified and the primary review for A is completed and the case A is linked to the counterparty account B and the case A is linked to the sanctions list entry C and A is linked to the approver group D

I can only escalate and request specialist approval for an aml case A linked to a counterparty account B, a sanctions list entry C, and a specialist team D if it is not the case that A is ready for approval
effects: Once I escalate and request specialist approval for an aml case A linked to a counterparty account B, a sanctions list entry C, and a specialist team D, it is the case that A is ready for approval and A has an escalation pending

approve_escalation.description: approve escalation for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C
preconditions: I can only approve escalation for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C if it is the case that A is ready for approval and A has an escalation pending and the case A is linked to the customer B and the case A is linked to the transaction C
effects: Once I approve escalation for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C, it is the case that A has an escalation approved

Once I approve escalation for an aml case A linked to a customer B and a transaction C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation pending and it is not the case anymore that the first line for the case A is verified and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A

reopen_case_with_document_after_approval.description: reopen an aml case A with an evidence item B and a document resource C after approval
preconditions: I can only reopen an aml case A with an evidence item B and a document resource C after approval if it is the case that A has an escalation approved and A is ready for approval and the case A is allocated and A has evidence B and C is available
I can only reopen an aml case A with an evidence item B and a document resource C after approval if it is not the case that the first line for the case A is verified
effects: Once I reopen an aml case A with an evidence item B and a document resource C after approval, it is the case that the first line for the case A is verified

request_senior_review_for_evidence_item.description: request senior review for an evidence item B in an aml case A
preconditions: I can only request senior review for an evidence item B in an aml case A if it is the case that A is ready for approval and the first line for the case A is verified and A has evidence B
I can only request senior review for an evidence item B in an aml case A if it is not the case that A has an escalation pending and it is not the case that a senior review has been requested for A
effects: Once I request senior review for an evidence item B in an aml case A, it is the case that a senior review has been requested for A

request_senior_review_with_signal.description: request senior review for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B
preconditions: I can only request senior review for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B if it is the case that A is ready for approval and the first line for the case A is verified and B is available

I can only request senior review for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B if it is not the case that A has an escalation pending and it is not the case that a senior review has been requested for A
effects: Once I request senior review for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B, it is the case that a senior review has been requested for A
Once I request senior review for an aml case A using an automated rule signal B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_senior_reviewer.description: assign a senior reviewer B to an aml case A for preferred review
preconditions: I can only assign a senior reviewer B to an aml case A for preferred review if it is the case that a senior review has been requested for A and B is available and the default senior reviewer for A is B
effects: Once I assign a senior reviewer B to an aml case A for preferred review, it is the case that A has the preferred senior reviewer B
Once I assign a senior reviewer B to an aml case A for preferred review, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_senior_reviewer_by_variant.description: assign a senior reviewer C to a case variant b A based on preferred reviewer for a case variant a case variant a B
preconditions: I can only assign a senior reviewer C to a case variant b A based on preferred reviewer for a case variant a case variant a B if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is tagged as variant b and C is a candidate for case variant b senior reviewer for A and B has the preferred senior reviewer C
I can only assign a senior reviewer C to a case variant b A based on preferred reviewer for a case variant a case variant a B if it is not the case that C is the assigned senior reviewer for A
effects: Once I assign a senior reviewer C to a case variant b A based on preferred reviewer for a case variant a case variant a B, it is the case that C is the assigned senior reviewer for A

mark_case_ready_for_finalization.description: mark an aml case A ready for finalization with an evidence item B and a document resource C
preconditions: I can only mark an aml case A ready for finalization with an evidence item B and a document resource C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is tagged as variant b and the first line for the case A is verified and a senior review has been requested for A and A has evidence B and C is available
I can only mark an aml case A ready for finalization with an evidence item B and a document resource C if it is not the case that ready for finalization A
effects: Once I mark an aml case A ready for finalization with an evidence item B and a document resource C, it is the case that ready for finalization A

preconditions: I can only finalize an aml case A if it is the case that A is tagged as variant a and the case A is registered and the case A is allocated and the primary review for A is completed and A is ready for approval and a senior review has been requested for A and the first line for the case A is verified
I can only finalize an aml case A if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize an aml case A, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_case_with_senior_review.description: finalize an aml case A with a senior reviewer B
preconditions: I can only finalize an aml case A with a senior reviewer B if it is the case that A is tagged as variant b and the case A is registered and the case A is allocated and the primary review for A is completed and A is ready for approval and a senior review has been requested for A and the first line for the case A is verified and B is the assigned senior reviewer for A
I can only finalize an aml case A with a senior reviewer B if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize an aml case A with a senior reviewer B, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_case_with_ready_flag.description: finalize an aml case A with ready flag
preconditions: I can only finalize an aml case A with ready flag if it is the case that A is tagged as variant b and the case A is registered and the case A is allocated and the primary review for A is completed and A is ready for approval and a senior review has been requested for A and the first line for the case A is verified and ready for finalization A
I can only finalize an aml case A with ready flag if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize an aml case A with ready flag, it is the case that A has been finalized

action_nl_templates.attach_evidence_to_case: attach evidence item {?evidence_item} to aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_evidence_from_case: detach evidence item {?evidence_item} from aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.complete_screening_with_evidence: complete screening for aml case {?aml_case} with evidence item {?evidence_item}
action_nl_templates.complete_screening_with_signal: complete screening for aml case {?aml_case} using automated rule signal {?automated_rule_signal}
action_nl_templates.certify_evidence_with_document: certify evidence item {?evidence_item} for aml case {?aml_case} using document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates.certify_evidence_with_senior_reviewer: certify evidence for aml case {?aml_case} with senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.attach_counterparty_to_case: attach counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_counterparty_from_case: detach counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_sanctions_entry_to_case: attach sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry} to aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_sanctions_entry_from_case: detach sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry} from aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.conduct_primary_review_queue: conduct primary review for aml case {?aml_case} in processing queue {?processing_queue} involving customer {?customer} and transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.conduct_primary_review_with_counterparty: conduct primary review for aml case {?aml_case} in processing queue {?processing_queue} with counterparty account {?counterparty_account} and specialist resource {?specialist_resource}
action_nl_templates.clear_temporary_review_markers: clear temporary review markers for aml case {?aml_case} linked to customer {?customer} and transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.request_escalation_approval: request escalation approval for aml case {?aml_case} linked to customer {?customer}, transaction {?transaction}, and escalation team {?escalation_team}
action_nl_templates.escalate_and_request_specialist_approval: escalate and request specialist approval for aml case {?aml_case} linked to counterparty account {?counterparty_account}, sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry}, and specialist team {?specialist_team}
action_nl_templates.approve_escalation: approve escalation for aml case {?aml_case} linked to customer {?customer} and transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.reopen_case_with_document_after_approval: reopen aml case {?aml_case} with evidence item {?evidence_item} and document resource {?document_resource} after approval
action_nl_templates.request_senior_review_for_evidence_item: request senior review for evidence item {?evidence_item} in aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates.request_senior_review_with_signal: request senior review for aml case {?aml_case} using automated rule signal {?automated_rule_signal}
action_nl_templates.assign_senior_reviewer: assign senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} to aml case {?aml_case} for preferred review
action_nl_templates.assign_senior_reviewer_by_variant: assign senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} to case variant b {?case_variant_b} based on preferred reviewer for case variant a {?case_variant_a}
action_nl_templates.mark_case_ready_for_finalization: mark aml case {?aml_case} ready for finalization with evidence item {?evidence_item} and document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_senior_review: finalize aml case {?aml_case} with senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_ready_flag: finalize aml case {?aml_case} with ready flag

predicate_nl_templates.screening_completed: screening for the case {?aml_case} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.first_line_verified: the first line for the case {?aml_case} is verified
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_customer: the case {?aml_case} is linked to the customer {?customer}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_transaction: the case {?aml_case} is linked to the transaction {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_counterparty: the case {?aml_case} is linked to the counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_sanctions_entry: the case {?aml_case} is linked to the sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.case_routed_to_queue: the case {?aml_case} is routed to the queue {?processing_queue}
predicate_nl_templates.primary_review_completed: the primary review for {?aml_case} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.senior_review_requested: a senior review has been requested for {?aml_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_variant_b_senior_reviewer_candidate: {?senior_reviewer} is a candidate for case variant b senior reviewer for {?aml_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_senior_reviewer: {?senior_reviewer} is the assigned senior reviewer for {?aml_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_queue_eligibility: {?aml_case} is eligible for the processing queue {?processing_queue}
predicate_nl_templates.case_counterparty_eligibility: {?aml_case} is eligible for the counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_specialist_resource_eligibility: {?aml_case} is eligible for the specialist resource {?specialist_resource}
predicate_nl_templates.case_sanctions_entry_eligibility: {?aml_case} is eligible for the sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.case_approver_group_link: {?aml_case} is linked to the approver group {?approver_group}
predicate_nl_templates.case_default_senior_reviewer: the default senior reviewer for {?aml_case} is {?senior_reviewer}

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_case_to_analyst: assign an aml case {?aml_case} to an analyst {?analyst}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_case_from_analyst: release an aml case {?aml_case} from an analyst {?analyst}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_evidence_to_case: attach an evidence item {?evidence_item} to an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_evidence_from_case: detach an evidence item {?evidence_item} from an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_screening_with_evidence: complete screening for an aml case {?aml_case} with an evidence item {?evidence_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_screening_with_signal: complete screening for an aml case {?aml_case} using an automated rule signal {?automated_rule_signal}
action_nl_templates_indef.certify_evidence_with_document: certify an evidence item {?evidence_item} for an aml case {?aml_case} using a document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.certify_evidence_with_senior_reviewer: certify evidence for an aml case {?aml_case} with a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_customer_to_case: attach a customer {?customer} to an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_customer_from_case: detach a customer {?customer} from an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_transaction_to_case: attach a transaction {?transaction} to an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_transaction_from_case: detach a transaction {?transaction} from an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_counterparty_to_case: attach a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_counterparty_from_case: detach a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_sanctions_entry_to_case: attach a sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry} to an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_sanctions_entry_from_case: detach a sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry} from an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.conduct_primary_review_queue: conduct primary review for an aml case {?aml_case} in a processing queue {?processing_queue} involving a customer {?customer} and a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.conduct_primary_review_with_counterparty: conduct primary review for an aml case {?aml_case} in a processing queue {?processing_queue} with a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} and a specialist resource {?specialist_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_temporary_review_markers: clear temporary review markers for an aml case {?aml_case} linked to a customer {?customer} and a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_escalation_approval: request escalation approval for an aml case {?aml_case} linked to a customer {?customer}, a transaction {?transaction}, and an escalation team {?escalation_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_and_request_specialist_approval: escalate and request specialist approval for an aml case {?aml_case} linked to a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}, a sanctions list entry {?sanctions_list_entry}, and a specialist team {?specialist_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_escalation: approve escalation for an aml case {?aml_case} linked to a customer {?customer} and a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.reopen_case_with_document_after_approval: reopen an aml case {?aml_case} with an evidence item {?evidence_item} and a document resource {?document_resource} after approval
action_nl_templates_indef.request_senior_review_for_evidence_item: request senior review for an evidence item {?evidence_item} in an aml case {?aml_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_senior_review_with_signal: request senior review for an aml case {?aml_case} using an automated rule signal {?automated_rule_signal}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_senior_reviewer: assign a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} to an aml case {?aml_case} for preferred review
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_senior_reviewer_by_variant: assign a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer} to a case variant b {?case_variant_b} based on preferred reviewer for a case variant a case variant a {?case_variant_a}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_case_ready_for_finalization: mark an aml case {?aml_case} ready for finalization with an evidence item {?evidence_item} and a document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_with_senior_review: finalize an aml case {?aml_case} with a senior reviewer {?senior_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_with_ready_flag: finalize an aml case {?aml_case} with ready flag

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a primitive object is also a object

Everything that is a aml case or a analyst or a processing queue or a transaction or a customer or a counterparty account or a evidence item or a automated rule signal or a senior reviewer or a document resource or a specialist resource or a sanctions list entry or a approver group is also a primitive object
Everything that is a escalation team or a specialist team is also a approver group
Everything that is a case variant a or a case variant b is also a aml case
